faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Union homes?
faqs.answer: Union's humid climate and abundance of older homes with basements, crawl spaces, and aging plumbing create perfect conditions for silverfish. These pests thrive in damp, dark areas and feed on paper, fabrics, and starches commonly found in residential properties throughout the area.
